# Aditya Karnam — AI Research & Insights

> Personal site of Aditya Karnam, a software engineer and AI researcher. Covers LLMs, agentic AI, brain-computer interfaces, AI hardware, AI safety, and the future of intelligent systems. 150+ long-form articles plus interactive AI tools.

## About

- [Homepage](https://adityakarnam.com/): AI research, tools, and writing by Aditya Karnam
- [AI Toolkit](https://adityakarnam.com/ai-toolkit/): Free interactive tools — Prompt Composer, Prompt Grader, Tweet Thread Generator
- [Spotlight](https://adityakarnam.com/spotlight/): Featured projects and highlights

## Author

- Name: Aditya Karnam
- Role: Software Engineer & AI Researcher
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WujCeDkAAAAJ&hl=en
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adityakarnamgrao/
- GitHub: https://github.com/adityak74
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/aditya_karnam
- Research: ERBGA (Efficient Reduced-Bias Genetic Algorithm) for community detection; presented at 2018 Midwest Bioinformatics Conference

## Topic Areas

- LLMs and next-generation language models (GPT-5, Gemini, Claude)
- Agentic AI and autonomous systems
- Brain-computer interfaces and neuromorphic computing
- AI hardware: custom chips, TPUs, data center infrastructure
- AI safety, alignment, and explainability
- Prompt engineering and AI tool building
- AI impact on jobs, society, and policy
- Practical ML implementation with Python and Rust

## AI Tools (Free, No Login Required)

- [Intelligent Prompt Composer](https://adityakarnam.com/ai-toolkit/intelligent-prompt-composer/): Transforms simple prompts into structured, high-performing instructions for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
- [Prompt Grader & Rewriter](https://adityakarnam.com/ai-toolkit/prompt-grader/): Scores prompts 0-100 and generates three rewrite variations with detailed feedback
- [Tweet Thread Generator](https://adityakarnam.com/ai-toolkit/tweet-thread-generator/): Converts any topic into engaging Twitter/X threads with hook optimization

## Full Content

- [Full site description](https://adityakarnam.com/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive content index, article summaries, tool documentation, and research background
